batch.jobdefinition.retrystrategy.CfnAbo: The retry strategy that's associated with a job. For more information, see [Automated job retries](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/batch/latest/userguide/job_retries.html) in the * AWS Batch User Guide*.

batch.jobdefinition.retrystrategy.Attemp.Description: The number of times to move a job to the `RUNNABLE` status. You can specify between 1 and 10 attempts. If the value of `attempts` is greater than one, the job is retried on failure the same number of attempts as the value.

batch.jobdefinition.retrystrategy.Evalua.Description: Array of up to 5 objects that specify the conditions where jobs are retried or failed. If this parameter is specified, then the `attempts` parameter must also be specified. If none of the listed conditions match, then the job is retried.
